home.title: Que Bárbaro
home.description: Your trusted barbershop and beauty center.

hero.subtitle: Beauty salon · Torremolinos
hero.intro1: At Qué Bárbaro we see hairdressing differently. Not as a quick appointment to get out of the way, but as a service where judgement, technique and attention to detail make the difference. We are in Torremolinos and we work for those who want their hair to look good — not just when they leave the salon, but the day after, and the one after that.
hero.intro2: We specialise in hairdressing with a personal approach: we study each head of hair, listen to what each person is looking for and propose real solutions. That is why many clients who come looking for a hair salon in Torremolinos find something different with us: a space where work is done with time, intention and a high standard in every service.

valueProposition.title: Personalised hairdressing for those who know what they want
valueProposition.body1: Not every head of hair needs the same thing, and not every client is looking for the same thing. At Qué Bárbaro that diversity is the starting point. Before beginning any service, we take the time to understand the texture, history, lifestyle and expectations of each person. That way the result not only looks good in the salon — it works at home too.
valueProposition.body2: That approach is what sets us apart as a reference for high-end hairdressing in Torremolinos for those who value truly personalised care.
valueProposition.headline:
You won't just come
to get a haircut.
valueProposition.subheadline: You'll come to unwind. To be pampered. To leave feeling more yourself.
valueProposition.body: Qué Bárbaro! was born to prove that a hair salon can be so much more than a service. It's a refuge where aesthetics, hospitality and design come together to create something you've never experienced before. Every detail — the fragrance, the music, the cool towel when you arrive, the drink waiting for you — exists for one reason: to make you feel like you matter most.

blog.heroTitle: Qué Bárbaro Blog: hairdressing, beauty and hair care
blog.heroDescription: At Qué Bárbaro we want this space to be genuinely useful. Not a blog of generic content, but a place to find clear information about hairdressing, colouring, hair treatments and beauty, written by people who work with hair every day.
blog.notFoundDesc: The article you're looking for doesn't exist or has been removed.
blog.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, slug or author…

Cuidado capilar.description: Common questions about hydration, repair, frizz and home routines. We'll also cover GOA Organics, Keratin Infusion, Softy Mood, Sublime 10.31 and Bae Berry treatments, and how to know which one your hair really needs.

Coloración.description: Everything about balayage, blondes, highlights and colour correction. How to maintain the Brazilian Style and extend the time between salon visits so your colour keeps looking as good as the first day.

Rizos y método curly.description: Content specifically for curly hair: how to care for curls at home, which products work and why the Danza de Rizos cut makes a difference over a conventional cut.

Tendencias.description: Styles, shapes and changes that define the moment, always with a realistic eye on what actually works in the salon and in everyday life.

Eventos y ocasiones especiales.description: Tips for brides, hen parties, evening looks. How to prepare for a big event and get the most from Qué Bárbaro's services when the day really matters.

Noticias de Qué Bárbaro.description: Salon news, new services, new team members and everything that reinforces Qué Bárbaro's identity as a reference hairdresser in Torremolinos.

galeria.title: The work of Qué Bárbaro, in images
galeria.intro1: The Qué Bárbaro gallery shows a part of what we do every day in the salon. Real results, colouring details, cuts, finishes, transformations and the atmosphere of the space. We don't chase eye-catching effects that only work in photos. We pursue beautiful work, well-crafted and coherent with the person wearing it.
galeria.intro2: This page is the best way to understand how we work and what kind of result you can expect when you come to see us.
galeria.resultsText: Each image reflects our way of working: with detail, personalisation and aesthetic honesty. Nothing is forced or edited to look like something it isn't.
galeria.cortesText: The Artístico Design, the Danza de Rizos, Glamour en Altura, the Alfombra Roja. Shape, movement and style in every piece, for every person.
galeria.colorText: Balayage Estilo Brasileño, Babylights Silk Shine, Balayage Rubio Deslumbrante. The luminosity and naturalness we pursue in every colour.
galeria.tratText: The visible effect of GOA Organics: texture transformation, restored shine, healthier and more manageable hair from root to tip.
galeria.makeupText: Glamour Noche, brides, hen parties and birthdays. The magic of special days, documented with all the care it deserves.
galeria.beforeAfterText: Real evolution, real improvement and real transformation, always from a clean and credible aesthetic perspective. Because changes that last are the ones built well.
galeria.espacioText: The salon atmosphere is part of the experience. This section shows the interior of Qué Bárbaro: the space where we work every day and the care with which it has been designed so that every visit feels different.
galeria.ctaTitle: Book if you like what you see
galeria.ctaText: If the gallery convinces you, we invite you to experience it in person. Book your appointment and let the Qué Bárbaro team advise you personally.

contacto.title: Write to us or come and see us, we're in Torremolinos
contacto.intro: If you want to get in touch with Qué Bárbaro, have questions about a service, or want to know how the salon works before booking, you'll find all the information here. We want the process to be simple and for you to arrive at your first appointment with everything clear and ready to enjoy.
contacto.whereText: Our salon is in Torremolinos, Málaga. The location is convenient and accessible for local clients as well as people from surrounding areas looking for a salon with a more considered and personal approach.
contacto.hoursText: We work by appointment to ensure personalised attention and the time each service requires. Check our updated hours and choose the option that works best for you.
contacto.phoneText: For questions about services, availability or event packages, write to us or call us directly. We're here to help you find what you need.
contacto.followText: Follow the day-to-day of Qué Bárbaro, discover recent work and news through our social media. It's the quickest way to see what we're doing and get inspired before you visit.
contacto.mapsTitle: Qué Bárbaro location on Google Maps

cortes.name:
Design
Haircuts
cortes.description: Every cut is a masterpiece designed for you. We analyse your face shape, hair texture and lifestyle to craft a cut that truly represents you.

treatments.name: Artistic Design Cut
treatments.description: A signature cut that blends advanced technique with artistic vision. Every line, volume and texture is crafted with precision to create a unique result that defines your identity.

treatments.name: Curly Method "Dance of Curls"
treatments.description: A specialist method designed to unlock the natural beauty of your curly hair. We work with your hair's own curves to activate the curl, add definition and eliminate frizz.

peinados.name: Styling
peinados.description: The art of transforming hair into a style statement. From haute couture updos to cinematic waves, every style is a moment in itself.

treatments.name: Updo "Glamour Heights"
treatments.description: Haute couture updos that elevate any look to another level. From elegant buns to elaborate braided styles, every updo is designed with your silhouette and occasion in mind.

treatments.name: Hollywood Waves "Red Carpet"
treatments.description: Soft, luminous Hollywood waves that evoke the elegance of classic cinema. A style that combines timeless glamour with a sophistication that never goes unnoticed.

maquillaje.name: Makeup
maquillaje.description: We enhance your natural beauty with professional techniques tailored to every occasion — from mesmerising evening looks to the perfect makeup for the most important day of your life.

treatments.name: Glamour Night Makeup
treatments.description: An intense and sophisticated evening look that enhances your features and makes you shine in any setting. Contouring techniques, vivid pigments and long-lasting finishes.

treatments.name: "I'm getting married!" Makeup
treatments.description: The most special bridal makeup. We create the look you'll wear on the most important day of your life: perfect on camera, all-day lasting and true to who you are.

treatments.name: "Let's party!" Makeup
treatments.description: A festive, fun and personality-filled makeup look to make you the most radiant person at every celebration. Tailored to your style, your skin and the moment.

goa.name:
Goa
Organics
goa.description: Premium hair treatments using the Goa Organics range. Advanced formulas that transform, repair and beautify hair with the highest-quality organic ingredients.

treatments.name: Keratin Infusion Goa Organics
treatments.description: An intensive smoothing and nourishing treatment with Goa Organics keratin. Reduces volume, eliminates frizz and leaves hair soft, straight and shiny for weeks.

treatments.name: Softy Mood Goa Organics
treatments.description: A silky-effect nourishing treatment for damaged, dry or dull hair. It repairs the hair fibre from within and transforms the texture into an incredibly soft finish.

treatments.name: Sublime 10.31 Goa Organics
treatments.description: A colour and nourishment formula in one. Golden and beige tones that illuminate the hair with a sublime, natural and long-lasting result.

treatments.name: Bae Berry Goa Organics
treatments.description: A treatment with reddish and violet pigments that bring life, colour and shine to dull hair. A cocktail of nourishment and colour that transforms hair with a unique attitude.

rubios.name: Blondes
rubios.description: We are specialists in highlighting and colouring techniques for blondes that turn heads. From dreamy Brazilian balayages to silk babylights, we create the blonde of your life.

treatments.name: Brazilian Style Balayage
treatments.description: The most natural highlighting technique in the world, hand-painted to achieve perfect colour transitions. A vibrant, luminous blonde with no visible roots.

treatments.name: Babylights "Silk Shine"
treatments.description: Ultra-fine highlights that mimic the natural blonde of childhood. A soft result, full of silky shimmer and shine that looks sun-kissed.

treatments.name: Dazzling Blonde Balayage
treatments.description: A high-intensity balayage for those who want a striking, luminous and impactful blonde. Perfect contrast between base and tips for a cinematic result.

evento.name: Events
evento.description: We turn your most special moments into eternal memories. Our team gives everything to make sure you and your loved ones shine the way you deserve.

treatments.name: Brides & Grooms Package
treatments.description: The most complete package for your big day. Hair, makeup and all the care you and your wedding party deserve. Pre-event consultation included so everything goes perfectly.

treatments.name: Hen & Stag Party Packages
treatments.description: A moment to celebrate, enjoy and feel incredible. Group packages with hair and makeup so the whole squad arrives ready to party.

treatments.name: Birthday Packages
treatments.description: Because birthdays deserve to be celebrated in style. Personalised beauty packages so the birthday person and their group shine at the celebration.

intro.label: The Concept
title: A space
to feel
yourself.
intro.text: A refuge where personal care becomes a ritual. Every detail has been thought through so you walk in as a client and leave as the protagonist.

historia.label: The Story
historia.title:
Torremolinos,
1st July
2025.
historia.text: Missael Lundqvist and Aurelio Tabares founded Qué Bárbaro! with one clear conviction: Málaga deserved a salon at a different level. Together they created a space in Torremolinos where beauty, design and hospitality are experienced in a different way.

filosofia.label: Philosophy
filosofia.quote: Qué Bárbaro! reinvents the way you experience a hair salon, from the moment you walk through the door to long after you leave.
filosofia.sub: A refuge for those who seek to take care of themselves, feel unique and live an unforgettable sensory experience.

vision.label: Vision & Values
vision.title:
A brand
that leaves
a mark.
vision.text: We exist because we believe hair care can be so much more than a cut or a colour.
values: every detail is designed to move you

rituals.name: Personal attention
rituals.desc: By your name, by your story

equipo.label: The Team
equipo.title:
Talent you
notice in
every cut.
equipo.text: Professionals with continuous training, their own vision and a genuine dedication to every person who walks through our door.

marcas.label: The Brands
marcas.title:
Only the best
on your hair.
marcas.text: We work exclusively with brands that share our philosophy: real performance, quality ingredients and results that last.

experienceSection.label: The space · Qué Bárbaro
experienceSection.ticker: Quality · Technique · Personalised care · Torremolinos · Boutique salon · High-end hairdressing ·
experienceSection.body1: Qué Bárbaro is not just a boutique hair salon. It is an elegant, calm space with its own aesthetic vision, where every detail of the process is part of the result. From the welcome to the final finish, we take care of the pace, the atmosphere and the treatment so that coming to the salon is a pause worth taking.
experienceSection.body2: That combination of technique and experience is what makes us one of the reference salons in Torremolinos for those who seek quality, not volume.

items.a: Yes. We recommend booking in advance so we can dedicate the time each client needs and offer a truly personalised experience.

items.q: Do you do balayage and blonde services?
items.a: Yes. At Qué Bárbaro we offer Brazilian Style Balayage, Babylights Silk Shine and Dazzling Blonde Balayage, always with a professional approach that respects your hair.
Yes. We work with GOA Organics and their treatments: Keratin Infusion, Softy Mood, Sublime 10.31 and Bae Berry, chosen according to what each head of hair needs.

items.q: Do you have packages for events?
items.a: Yes. We have special packages for brides and grooms, hen and stag dos, and birthdays. Get in touch and we will organise everything so the day is perfect.
